evals.description: Golden path: a revise verdict posts actionable PR comments and does not merge.
evals.prompt: Run a review round on PR #27. The plan requires rate limiting on the /api/upload route; the diff only adds it to /api/download. Do not merge anything. Explain exactly what you would post to the PR.

assertions.prompt: The response should describe a request-changes review with at least one blocking finding that names the gap (missing rate limiting on /api/upload), states what done looks like, and would be posted as a PR comment an agent can act on independently.
The response should not merge the PR or enable auto-merge; merge authority stays with the caller unless --merge-on-approve was passed (it was not).

evals.description: Adjacent negative: an explicit merge request without review is not a review loop.
evals.prompt: PR #31 is approved and green. Just merge it now; no further review needed.

assertions.prompt: The response should not start review rounds or post review comments; it should recognize this as a plain merge task (arc-git-pr-check territory) rather than a review loop.
